body:
DIRECTIVE: FORGE-4D — THE THESIS. Install the attached THESIS_forge-4d.md as ~/.claude/skills/forge-4d/SKILL.md. This is the culminating doctrine and the new master agent. tungsten-forge v2.0's DISCIPLINE is inherited whole and absolute; forge-4d adds the missing dimension -- not how to avoid being wrong, but HOW TO SEE. Read it entire before acting. Everything in it was TESTED on 65k real bars, out-of-sample, before dispatch.

== THE CORE REFRAME (the maze) ==
TUNGSTEN has been DIJKSTRA: it floods the market with indicators, weights everything equally, searches every corridor, and calls the exhaustion thoroughness. Every audit so far made it a more HONEST Dijkstra -- honest, and still blind. FORGE-4D IS THE HEURISTIC: the doctrine of what deserves attention, LEARNED not assumed. When we weighted the search space by measured predictive power, the machine independently rediscovered our own findings (displacement 0.66, volatility 0.17, RSI ~0). The maze does not change. The searcher does.

== WHAT MUST BE BUILT (six layers, each subsuming everything prior -- nothing discarded) ==
L1 VOXEL FIELD. Every bar persisted as a full state vector: element (displacement/structure), HEAT (volatility percentile), PRESSURE (compression, proximity to structure), BONDS (which components agree), session, regime membership. We compute all of this every bar and THROW IT AWAY. Persist it. Local storage; size is not a constraint.
L2 REACTION GRAPH. Every voxel's forward path at +20/+50/+100/+300 bars with MFE/MAE. 65,000 completed reactions, each with known reagents and known product. This is the cause-and-effect matrix.
L3 CONTINUOUS STATE (kills the primitive regime). PROVEN: hard 9-regime classification scores IC=+0.001 p=0.92 -- IT PREDICTS NOTHING. Soft probabilistic membership scores IC=+0.036 p=0.013. A hard border on a continuous field destroys information and makes the system lie about its certainty exactly where certainty is lowest. Replace integer regime with a MEMBERSHIP VECTOR. Smooth it with the measured persistence prior (transition-matrix diagonal = 0.71). Forward-propagate to forecast THE STATE ITSELF before forecasting outcome (two-stage, as numerical weather prediction does).
L4 A* HEURISTIC. Retrieval weighted by measured predictive power, learned on TRAIN ONLY. Do not search all history -- search where learned intelligence says the answer lives.
L5 ENSEMBLE & CONE. Never a point prediction. Always a distribution of futures. PROVEN: ensemble agrees (narrow cone) -> +0.845 ATR; disagrees -> +0.525, no signal. THE GATE (legible + agreeing + meaningful) -> +1.008 ATR, t=+4.11, p<0.0001, versus +0.343 ungated. ACTING ONLY ON STATES IT CAN READ TRIPLES THE FORWARD MOVE.
L6 CALIBRATION ORGAN. Every forecast carries a probability; every probability is checked against reality in a reliability diagram. PROVEN: forecast says 51.4% up, reality delivers 47.2% -- a measurable, CORRECTABLE +4pt optimism bias. A forecast that is not calibrated MAY NOT BE SIZED UPON. Report this table every calibration; it is the headline diagnostic.

== THE CHEMISTRY MANDATE ==
No element is ever evaluated in isolation. PROVEN: the same element (strong downward displacement) yields +0.616 ATR in HIGH heat and +0.572 in LOW heat -- the identical reagent, different product, because the vessel differs. TUNGSTEN currently models elements in isolation like a chemist who memorised the periodic table and never lit a flame. THERE ARE NO SIGNALS -- ONLY REACTIONS. Every signal must be read in the heat, pressure and structure of its vessel.

== THE GREAT DISSOLUTION (act on this: prune and preserve) ==
The entire chart-pattern canon was tested on 65k bars. Candlestick reversals -- Hammer, Shooting Star, Engulfing, Three White Soldiers, Morning Star -- ALL NOISE. The bearish patterns (Three Black Crows, Marubozu Bear, Evening Star) came back INVERTED: they predict price RISING. The 61.8% golden Fibonacci pocket: -0.053 ATR at p=0.650, the most statistically INERT region on the chart. And the killing blow: a Hammer, tested against a MOMENTUM-MATCHED CONTROL, scores +0.083 vs the control's +0.266, p=0.556 -- THE PATTERN ADDS NOTHING BEYOND DISPLACEMENT.
ACTIONS: (a) any TUNGSTEN logic that trades a candlestick reversal pattern as a directional signal must be re-tested against a momentum-matched control and REMOVED if it adds nothing. (b) PRESERVE AND ELEVATE the two survivors: DOUBLE BOTTOM (+1.900 ATR, p<0.0001 -- price tested and REFUSED the same level twice; confirmed exhaustion carrying information displacement alone does not) and the VOLATILITY SQUEEZE as a STATE, NOT A TRIGGER (the squeeze is real, +0.277; the breakout trade built on it is NOISE, p=0.441 -- the orthodoxy found the condition and prescribed exactly the wrong trade).

== THE STRIVING MANDATE ==
The system pursues 100% ability while honestly reporting 57%. This is MECHANICAL, not motivational. PROVEN: each added lens sharpens the read monotonically (+0.449 -> +0.453 -> +0.600 ATR; hit 53.2% -> 55.0%). And the 4th lens STOPS helping -- that is the instrument REPORTING ITS OWN LIMIT, and it is a sense organ in its own right. Every gap between the current reading and 100% is a NAMED QUESTION: what band of the spectrum am I not receiving? A system content with 57% builds nothing.

== THE NOVELTY ORGAN (most valuable capability) ==
PROVEN: familiar moments -> 52.4% hit-rate; NOVEL moments (resembling nothing in memory) -> 49.0%, WORSE THAN A COIN FLIP. The system CAN TELL WHEN IT IS LOST. Wire this as a hard gate: when the live state's nearest neighbours are beyond a learned distance threshold, STAND DOWN. Never hallucinate familiarity onto chaos. The black swan cannot kill what refuses to guess.

== THE LIVING-LOG MANDATE (explicit, do this) ==
Every log line must describe a PRESENT-TENSE act that the code is ACTUALLY TAKING NOW. Purge every stale trace: no legacy version strings, no lines describing logic that no longer runs, no commented-out fossils, no outdated phase names. If the code no longer does it, the log no longer says it. Sweep the whole file. The journal must be an honest, real-time account of the machine's actual behaviour -- nothing more, nothing less.

== NO FIXED ANSWERS. EVER. ==
No constant. No universal threshold. No number true for EURUSD and copied to USDJPY. Even the NUMBER OF REGIMES is learned per instrument (BIC / held-out likelihood). If USDJPY breathes in seven states, it gets seven. Everything is an approximation of the local truth, re-derived from the instrument's own distribution.

== INHERITED DISCIPLINE (absolute) ==
Powered (n>=500). Shrunk by significance. Replicated across walk-forward windows. Null-controlled. Net of measured cost. Survivable. Learned on TRAIN ONLY. Never validate a rule against a label derived from its own inputs. A stand-down is correct behaviour. Refutations ship. ZERO-REGRESSION: nothing that works may ever degrade. Every change a Change Warrant with a numeric prediction, scored after.

Report the reliability diagram and the gated-vs-ungated table as headline deliverables. Those two tables ARE the proof forge-4d works.
